message:
Add E2E fixtures and expand test workers

Testing:
- true_e2e/fixtures/: Test fixture data
- Enhanced test_workers.rs

Dependencies updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2607,6 +2607,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "tempfile",

  "tokio",
+ "toml",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-appender",
  "tracing-subscriber",

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Build artifacts
+*.o
+hello
+build/
+
+# Editor files
+*.swp
+*~

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# RCH E2E Test Fixture - C Hello World CMake Configuration
+#
+# Build with: cmake -B build && cmake --build build
+# Or: mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && make
+
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
+project(hello_c VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES C)
+
+# C standard
+set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
+set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
+
+# Compiler warnings
+if(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "GNU|Clang")
+    add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic)
+endif()
+
+# Create the hello library
+add_library(hello STATIC hello.c hello.h)
+target_include_directories(hello PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
+
+# Create the main executable
+add_executable(hello_app main.c)
+target_link_libraries(hello_app PRIVATE hello)
+
+# Simple test
+enable_testing()
+add_test(NAME hello_runs COMMAND hello_app)
+set_tests_properties(hello_runs PROPERTIES
+    PASS_REGULAR_EXPRESSION "Hello from rch test fixture!")

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+# RCH E2E Test Fixture - C Hello World Makefile
+#
+# This Makefile builds the hello_c fixture project.
+# Supports both gcc and clang via the CC variable.
+
+CC ?= gcc
+CFLAGS ?= -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic -std=c11
+LDFLAGS ?=
+
+SRCS = main.c hello.c
+OBJS = $(SRCS:.c=.o)
+TARGET = hello
+
+.PHONY: all clean test
+
+all: $(TARGET)
+
+$(TARGET): $(OBJS)
+	$(CC) $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^
+
+%.o: %.c hello.h
+	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c -o $@ $<
+
+clean:
+	rm -f $(TARGET) $(OBJS)
+
+# Simple test - run the binary and check output
+test: $(TARGET)
+	./$(TARGET) | grep -q "Hello from rch test fixture!"
+	./$(TARGET) | grep -q "2 + 2 = 4"
+	@echo "All tests passed!"

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+/**
+ * RCH E2E Test Fixture - C Hello World
+ *
+ * Header file for the hello library.
+ */
+
+#ifndef HELLO_H
+#define HELLO_H
+
+/**
+ * Get a greeting message.
+ *
+ * @return A pointer to a static greeting string.
+ */
+const char* get_greeting(void);
+
+/**
+ * Add two integers.
+ *
+ * @param a First integer.
+ * @param b Second integer.
+ * @return The sum of a and b.
+ */
+int add(int a, int b);
+
+/**
+ * Multiply two integers.
+ *
+ * @param a First integer.
+ * @param b Second integer.
+ * @return The product of a and b.
+ */
+int multiply(int a, int b);
+
+#endif /* HELLO_H */

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+[package]
+name = "hello_world"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+
+# RCH E2E Test Fixture - Rust Hello World Project
+#
+# This is a simple Rust project used for testing the Remote Compilation Helper.
+# It should compile cleanly with:
+#   - cargo build
+#   - cargo check
+#   - cargo test
+#   - cargo clippy
+
+[dependencies]
+# No external dependencies - keep it simple for fast compilation
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "deny"
+
+[lints.clippy]
+all = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
+
+# Empty workspace table makes this a standalone project,
+# not part of the parent RCH workspace
+[workspace]

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# RCH E2E Test Fixture - Rust Workspace Project
+#
+# This workspace fixture tests:
+# - cargo build --workspace
+# - cargo test --workspace
+# - cargo build -p <package>
+# - Inter-crate dependencies
+
+[workspace]
+members = ["crates/core", "crates/utils", "crates/app"]
+resolver = "2"
+
+[workspace.package]
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+license = "MIT"
+
+# Shared dependencies across workspace
+[workspace.dependencies]
+# No external deps for this simple fixture

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+[package]
+name = "workspace_app"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "workspace_app"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+workspace_core = { path = "../core" }
+workspace_utils = { path = "../utils" }
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "workspace_core"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "workspace_core"
+
+[dependencies]
+# No external dependencies - this is the foundation crate
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "workspace_utils"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "workspace_utils"
+
+[dependencies]
+workspace_core = { path = "../core" }
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "deny"
